title: dForge Folders
description: Folder tree for a dForge module. The file IS the root folder (not a map keyed by code). Sub-folders live under `children`, keyed by folder code.

description.description: Optional description text (shown in breadcrumb / header area)

parentCode.description: Parent folder code. Usually omitted: nested folders go under `children` of their parent. Only used by sparse-tree imports.

inheritSecurity.description: Whether to inherit security rights from the parent folder. Default: true.

entities.description: Entity code → folder-entity binding (which view to show, quick-add, row-level filter).

children.description: Nested folders keyed by sub-folder code. Recursive — children can have their own children.

viewName.description: Entity view name (data view code) to use in this folder. Common values include 'default'.

quickAdd.description: Enable the quick-add (+) button for this entity in this folder

rowFilter.description: Row-level filter. Either a SQL expression string (e.g. "is_customer = true") or a canonical filter object (`{c,o,v}` for one condition, `{g,i:[]}` for a group).

filter.description: Canonical dForge filter expression — same shape as in data_views.json. Either `{c, o, v}` or `{g, i: [...]}`.
